'''T'nun Bdu''' was the captain of the [[Sullustan (starship)|''Sullustan'']], a [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]]. His ship was intercepted by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]] and destroyed when she found heavy weapons, communications equipment, and prefabricated building material that could be used to aid the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], as well as maps and information on the Rebel Alliance in its databanks.
